critical_high_fixed.finding: Only a first discovered parameter was checked.
critical_high_fixed.fix: Inventory every discoverable backend parameter and buffer; reject empty, CPU, or mixed placement for requested CUDA.
Record real CUDA allocated and reserved deltas around compressor construction, or null with unsupported-field metadata.

critical_high_fixed.finding: GSM8K GPU bypass could be labeled as a loaded GPU compressor.
critical_high_fixed.fix: Derive composition from actual compressor residency before condition-specific labels.

critical_high_fixed.finding: LLMLingua/tiktoken may attempt network retrieval for its encoding cache.
critical_high_fixed.fix: Documented as an explicit environment prerequisite and probe failure; no network fallback is claimed.

reviewed.cleanup_and_oom: RuntimeEngine.close releases all model references, collects garbage, synchronizes CUDA, empties cache and IPC collections; process-isolated workers limit cross-condition retention.
reviewed.benchmark_and_evaluator_integrity: workflow validates matrix/task identity, parent-worker config hashes, fixture ordering, git state and evaluator manifests; QMSum remains proxy-only NOT_CLAIMED.
reviewed.paths_and_task_ids: production runtime paths resolve through config/path helpers; legacy diagnostic runners retain historical task labels but are noncanonical.
reviewed.cli_and_packaging: pyproject exposes ccdf; CLI has run, benchmark, evaluate, paths and no documented unimplemented command.
reviewed.resources: current RSS, peak RSS, CUDA allocation/reservation, composition and unsupported attribution fields are emitted consistently.
reviewed.tests_and_docs: focused Rec-T07 hotfix tests cover placement, fallback, bypass composition, GPU bytes/metadata; README commands are limited to parser/path commands verified without models.

lower_severity_findings.finding: Isolated target and drafter GPU attribution is unavailable in a shared CUDA allocator.
lower_severity_findings.disposition: Explicit null fields and unsupported metadata retained.

lower_severity_findings.finding: A host without visible CUDA cannot perform the real GPU probe.
lower_severity_findings.disposition: No benchmark rerun; v2 runtime validation is test-covered and the limitation is recorded.

lower_severity_findings.finding: Historical Rec-T03/Rec-T04 modules retain legacy names and task IDs.
lower_severity_findings.disposition: They are marked noncanonical and excluded from Rec-T06D/Rec-T07 workflow.
